nasb.text: I will put My Spirit within you and cause you to walk in My statutes, and you will be careful to observe My ordinances.

esv.text: And I will put my Spirit within you, and cause you to walk in my statutes and be careful to obey my rules.

cnv.text: 我必把我的靈放在你們裡面，使你們遵行我的律例，謹守遵行我的典章。

ccb.text: 我要把我的灵放在你们里面，使你们恪守我的律例，谨遵我的典章。
